honesty_statement: This experiment is not exact Sun reproduction. This experiment is a local GDPR-50 semantic extraction study inspired by Sun-style concepts.

components_present.actual_implementation: keyword-based modality/actor/action extraction with rule templates inspired by Sun-style concepts
keyword-based extraction enhanced with spaCy dependency parsing and sentence splitting
keyword-based rule extraction with LLM (qwen3.7-max) fallback for missing fields, 49 calls on GDPR-50

dataset_source: Local GDPR-50 (50 sentences selected from GDPR Articles 5-50, not the original Sun dataset)
label_source: Manually coded, not from Sun annotations
warnings: Method names contain 'sun_style' which may imply exact Sun reproduction. This is misleading.
No BERT classifier, no syntactic parsing tree, no BPMN matching present.
This is a local semantic extraction study, not Sun-method validation.
recommended_claim_boundary: DO claim: 'local GDPR-50 semantic extraction study'
